= Early Game =
One off icons that are part of the early game.

= [[Chore Dispatch]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ishikawa Rip's Collection}}
|}

= [[Crafting]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Color Order Capsule}}||Unlocks Species Sequence Crafting
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Colorful Fungi}}||Unlocks Fungi Crafting
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Gene Mutagen}}||Unlocks Organ Slime Crafting
|}

= Early Powerups and [[Consumables]] =
Early Game powerups and consumables

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Animal Cart}}||[[Hitmen|Hitman No. 12]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Battle Memory Card}}||[[Value_Packs#Power_Value_Pack|Power Value Pack]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Colorful Fungi}}||[[Value_Packs#Power_Value_Pack|Power Value Pack]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fungus Lunch Box}}||[[Value_Packs#Power_Value_Pack|Power Value Pack]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Guanyin Tea}}||[[Ghost Zadako]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Legal Documents}}||[[Hitmen|Hitman No. 11]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Musashi's Legacy}}||Using {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}}s in [[Yamato]].
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Psychic Fungus Set}}||Power Bonus
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Rainbow Fungus Set}}||Power Bonus
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Taichi Chest}}||Using {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}}s in [[Koryeo]].
|}

= [[Home Base]] =
Stuff around the home base that needs to be powered up or used.

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Deliverbot}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|DNA Evolution Kit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Military Bomb}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Super Snail Special}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Terminal Core}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Underground Explorer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Universal Key}}
|}

= [[Rocket]] =
Icons to do with repairing the Rocket.

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cockpit}}||Also Cockpit I, II, III
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bunker}}||Also Bunker I, II, III
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thruster}}||Also Thruster I, II, III, IV, V
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Energy Core (Rocket)}}||[[Yamato_Cards#Tier_3_(Blue)|Yamato Card]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Immortal Engine}}||[[Cathay_Cards#Tier_3_(Blue)|Cathay Card]]
|}

= [[Mailbox#Zuckie|Zuckie]] =
Icons to do with Zuckie.
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mage's Notes}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Zuckie's Invitation}}|Also Zuckie's Invitation I, II, III
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ancient Snail Fossil|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Facenote|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ticket Gleaners|green}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Rocket]]
